fields.name: repayment_schedule
fields.description: Root container for the complete repayment schedule and loan details

children.name: loan_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the loan issued by the credit department

children.name: customer_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the customer who holds the loan

children.name: customer_name
children.description: Full name of the customer

children.name: loan_type
children.description: Classification of the loan product

children.name: principal_amount
children.description: Original loan amount disbursed to the customer

children.name: interest_rate
children.description: Annual interest rate applied to the loan

children.name: loan_term_months
children.description: Total duration of the loan in months

children.name: start_date
children.description: Date when the loan commenced

children.name: maturity_date
children.description: Date when the loan is scheduled to be fully repaid

children.name: currency
children.description: ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary amounts in the schedule

children.name: schedule_version
children.description: Version identifier for the repayment schedule document

children.name: generated_date
children.description: Date and time when the repayment schedule was generated

children.name: repayment_frequency
children.description: Frequency at which repayments are scheduled

children.name: total_repayments
children.description: Total number of scheduled repayment installments

children.name: repayments
children.description: Ordered list of individual repayment installments with payment breakdown

children.name: payment_number
children.description: Sequential number of the repayment installment

children.name: due_date
children.description: Date on which the repayment installment is due

children.name: principal_payment
children.description: Portion of the installment that reduces the loan principal

children.name: interest_payment
children.description: Portion of the installment that covers accrued interest

children.name: total_payment
children.description: Total amount due for this installment (principal plus interest)

children.name: outstanding_balance
children.description: Remaining loan principal balance after this payment is made

children.name: status
children.description: Current status of the repayment installment

children.name: summary
children.description: Aggregate financial summary of the entire loan repayment schedule

children.name: total_amount_payable
children.description: Total sum of all repayment installments over the life of the loan

children.name: total_interest
children.description: Total interest charges across all repayment installments

children.name: amount_paid_to_date
children.description: Cumulative principal and interest paid by the customer to date

children.name: next_payment_due
children.description: Due date of the next scheduled repayment installment

children.name: next_payment_amount
children.description: Total amount due for the next scheduled repayment installment

children.name: metadata
children.description: Technical metadata about the message exchange between credit and customer services systems

children.name: source_system
children.description: Originating system that generated the repayment schedule

children.name: destination_system
children.description: Target system receiving the repayment schedule

children.name: message_id
children.description: Unique identifier for this message transmission

children.name: timestamp
children.description: Date and time when the message was transmitted
